heading: Effect of subchapter on other criminal laws
label: 796 Effect of subchapter on other criminal laws
text: The foregoing provisions of this subchapter shall be construed as being in addition to and not in modification of existing criminal statutes.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , known as the Subversive Activities Control Act of 1950, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title I of such act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act Sept. 23, 1950, ch. 102464 Stat. 987section 781 of this title
